areaLabel: Border Fort East Road and Forward Camp Slice
notes: Seventh real slice extends east from chapter-06 into a forward-camp road and supply yard. It is the first chapter that actively reuses the new cutscene minimum (`facePlayer` + `movePlayer`) inside a real gate transition while keeping gameplay closure and visual backlog in parallel. / 第七段真实切片从 chapter-06 继续向东扩展到前营东路与补给场，也是第一个在真实章节里主动复用新 cutscene 最小能力（`facePlayer` + `movePlayer`）来完成营门过场，同时继续保持 gameplay 闭环与视觉 backlog 并行推进。
title: Forward Camp Corridor
